title: PNaLiS
description:
A vanilla optimization pack with built-in shaders and a resource pack

PNaLiS:
P (Phosphor)
Na (Sodium)
Li (Lithium)
S (Iris Shaders)
body:
PNaLiS is a lightweight vanilla+ modpack that includes some basegame performance optimizations with some quality of life additions and included shaders!

PNaLiS:\
P (Phosphor)\
Na (Sodium)\
Li (Lithium)\
S (Shaders)
